title: Is Amcor (AMCR) a Great Value Stock Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: 8 Picks Due For A Short-Term Bounce (Technical Analysis)
text: I am working on some quant-based sort research looking for "bounces" in price from recent selloffs in individual company names. Minor but quick gains are one goal. Another is to hold a diversified list for 3-6 months to achieve sizable, steady gains.

title: The Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Quality Scores
text: The annual rebalancing and subsequent changes to the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index have produced a new list of 67 dividend growth stocks called the Dividend Aristocrats. I rank the Dividend Aristocrats using Quality Snapshots, an elegant and effective system for assessing the quality of dividend growth stocks.

title: Amcor (AMCR) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Up Y/Y
text: Amcor's (AMCR) second-quarter fiscal 2023 results gain on improved pricing. The company maintains its adjusted constant-currency earnings per share growth guidance at 3-8% for fiscal 2023.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For February
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. By yield, VFC topped all Aristocrats. Top-ten yields from TROW, ESS, FRT, AMCR, ABBV, O, IBM, MMM, WBA, & VFC, averaged 4.38%.

title: Amcor plc (AMCR) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR ) Q2 2023 Results Conference Call February 7, 2023 5:30 PM ET Company Participants Tracey Whitehead - Head of Investor Relations Ron Delia - Chief Executive Officer Michael Casamento - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Anthony Pettinari - Citi John Purtell - Macquarie Asset Management George Staphos - Bank of America Larry Gandler - Credit Suisse Ghansham Panjabi - Baird Daniel Kang - CLSA Adam Samuelson - Goldman Sachs Nathan Reilly - UBS Mike Roxland - Truist Securities Jakob Cakarnis - Jarden Australia Kyle White - Deutsche Bank Cameron McDonald - E&P Richard Johnson - Jefferies Brook Campbell-Crawford - Barrenjoey Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Amcor Half Year 2023 Results. Today's call is being recorded.

title: Amcor (AMCR) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Amcor (AMCR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.56% and 0.19%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Amcor (AMCR) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Amcor's (AMCR) second-quarter fiscal 2023 results will likely reflect the impact of lower volumes due to muted consumer spending. High costs and interest expenses are expected to hurt margins.
